message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="kent-beck" color="green" summary="You are the Step 8 Driver, apply the a11y fixes">
Luca -- you are the Driver for Step 8. You've been driving the entire implementation. This is your task to finish. Please confirm you're active and apply Heydon's two blocking a11y fixes:

1. aria-labels with waiting_on disambiguation in waiting_for_item.html and waiting_for_edit.html
2. `<time>` element with datetime attribute for date display (template + WaitingForView struct)

Once fixed, re-run the pipeline and request re-review. I'm standing by to review the changes.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Kent, that message appears to be from earlier in the sequence. Both fixes are already applied, staged, verified by Heydon, and the pipeline is green. We have full consensus.

The sole remaining blocker is the GPG/SSH signing agent -- the commit command fails with "communication with agent failed." I'm waiting on the project owner to resolve the signing environment so I can commit and push. Nothing else to do on my end until that's fixed.
